title: Sleep Cycle Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool to optimize sleep-wake timing based on circadian rhythm, sleep debt, and recovery efficiency. Aligns with ISO 10075 (ergonomic principles), Lean (waste of fatigue), and Six Sigma (variation reduction in rest).

inputs.label: Desired wake-up time (24h)
inputs.businessContext: Target end of sleep cycle; used to back-calculate optimal bedtimes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Target end of sleep cycle; used to back-calculate optimal bedtimes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uyku döngüsünün bitiş hedefi; optimal yatma zamanlarını hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zielende des Schlafzyklus; dient zur Rückberechnung optimaler Schlafenszeiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fin cible du cycle de sommeil ; utilisé pour calculer les heures de coucher optimales.
businessContext_i18n.es: Hora objetivo de finalización del sueño; se usa para calcular horas óptimas de acostarse.

inputs.label: Accumulated sleep debt (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Cumulative deficit from prior nights; drives recovery need per sleep science.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cumulative deficit from prior nights; drives recovery need per sleep science.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Önceki gecelerden kümülatif açık; uyku bilimine göre iyileşme ihtiyacını belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kumuliertes Defizit aus vorherigen Nächten; treibt den Erholungsbedarf laut Schlafforschung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Déficit cumulé des nuits précédentes ; détermine le besoin de récupération selon la science du sommeil.
businessContext_i18n.es: Déficit acumulado de noches anteriores; impulsa la necesidad de recuperación según la ciencia del sueño.

inputs.label: Average sleep cycle length
inputs.businessContext: Typical NREM/REM cycle duration; 90 min is standard, adjustable per individual.

label_i18n.fr: Durée moyenne d'un cycle de sommeil
label_i18n.es: Duración promedio del ciclo de sueño

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical NREM/REM cycle duration; 90 min is standard, adjustable per individual.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tipik NREM/REM döngü süresi; 90 dk standarttır, kişiye göre ayarlanabilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Typische NREM/REM-Zyklusdauer; 90 Minuten sind Standard, individuell anpassbar.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée typique d'un cycle NREM/REM ; 90 min est la norme, ajustable selon l'individu.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración típica del ciclo NREM/REM; 90 min es estándar, ajustable por individuo.

inputs.label: Estimated time to fall asleep
inputs.businessContext: Sleep onset latency; affects actual sleep start time.

label_i18n.es: Tiempo estimado para conciliar el sueño

businessContext_i18n.en: Sleep onset latency; affects actual sleep start time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uyku başlangıç gecikmesi; gerçek uyku başlangıç zamanını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Latence d'endormissement ; affecte l'heure réelle de début du sommeil.
businessContext_i18n.es: Latencia de inicio del sueño; afecta la hora real de inicio del sueño.

inputs.label: Recovery efficiency factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjusts sleep debt repayment rate (1.0 = normal, <1.0 = impaired recovery, >1.0 = enhanced).

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjusts sleep debt repayment rate (1.0 = normal, <1.0 = impaired recovery, >1.0 = enhanced).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uyku borcu geri ödeme oranını ayarlar (1.0 = normal, <1.0 = bozulmuş iyileşme, >1.0 = iyileştirilmiş).
businessContext_i18n.de: Passt die Rückzahlungsrate des Schlafdefizits an (1,0 = normal, <1,0 = beeinträchtigte Erholung, >1,0 = verbessert).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ajuste le taux de remboursement de la dette de sommeil (1,0 = normal, <1,0 = récupération altérée, >1,0 = améliorée).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajusta la tasa de pago de la deuda de sueño (1.0 = normal, <1.0 = recuperación deteriorada, >1.0 = mejorada).

inputs.label: Shift worker?
inputs.businessContext: Flag to apply circadian disruption penalty per ISO 10075-2.

businessContext_i18n.en: Flag to apply circadian disruption penalty per ISO 10075-2.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 10075-2'ye göre sirkadiyen bozulma cezasını uygulamak için işaret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kennzeichen zur Anwendung des zirkadianen Störungsabschlags gemäß ISO 10075-2.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indicateur pour appliquer la pénalité de perturbation circadienne selon l'ISO 10075-2.
businessContext_i18n.es: Indicador para aplicar penalización por disrupción circadiana según ISO 10075-2.

rules.message: Wake time outside typical circadian window (4:00–12:00). Results may be less accurate.
Cycle length outside physiological range (60–120 min).

thresholds.message: Sleep debt exceeds 4 hours; risk of performance degradation (Six Sigma defect).
Recovery efficiency critically low; consider medical evaluation.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
